rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MEGAN LOUISE FURTH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner F.P.Furth For Order Staying Deposition Of D. Dodick, M.D. And Quashing Objector Sokol'S Notice Thereof, And For Protective Order.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for June 30, 2006. Petitioner Frederick P. Furth's Motion For Order Staying Deposition Of David Dodick, M.D., and Quashing Objector Sokol's Notice Thereof, and For Protective Order is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. = (612/HEWLETT)
